2605.17978.title: AutoVecCoder: Teaching LLMs to Generate Explicitly Vectorized Code
2605.17978.paper_summary: Vectorization via Single Instruction, Multiple Data (SIMD) architectures is a cornerstone of high-performance computing. To fully exploit hardware potential, developers often resort to explicit vectorization using intrinsics, as compiler-based auto-vectorization frequently yields suboptimal results due to conservative static analysis. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable proficiency in general code generation, they struggle with explicit vectorization due to the scarcity of high-quality corpora and the strict semantic constraints of low-level hardware instructions. In this paper, we propose AutoVecCoder, a novel framework designed to empower LLMs with the capability of automated explicit vectorization. AutoVecCoder integrates two core components: VecPrompt, an automated data synthesis pipeline to inject domain-specific intrinsic knowledge; and VecRL, a reinforcement learning framework that aligns code generation with execution efficiency. AutoVecCoder-8B trained by this framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on the SSE and AVX subsets of SimdBench and, in some cases, generates implementations surpassing standard -O3 optimizations, effectively overcoming the inherent bottlenecks of traditional automated vectorization.
2605.17978.paper_summary_zh: 透過單指令多資料（SIMD）架構的向量化是高性能計算的基石。為了充分發揮硬體潛力，開發者通常依賴使用內建函數的明確向量化，因為基於編譯器的自動向量化常常因為保守的靜態分析而產生次優結果。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）在一般程式碼生成方面展現了卓越的能力，但由於高品質語料的稀缺以及低層硬體指令的嚴格語義限制，它們在明確向量化方面面臨挑戰。在本文中，我們提出了AutoVecCoder，一個旨在賦能LLMs自動明確向量化能力的新框架。AutoVecCoder整合了兩個核心組件：VecPrompt，一個自動化數據合成管道，用於注入特定領域的內建知識；以及VecRL，一個將程式碼生成與執行效率對齊的強化學習框架。由此框架訓練的AutoVecCoder-8B在SSE和AVX子集的SimdBench上達到了最先進的性能，在某些情況下，生成的實現超越了標準的-O3優化，有效克服了傳統自動向量化的固有瓶頸。
2605.17978.author: Shangzhan Li et.al.
2605.17978.authors: Shangzhan Li, Xinyu Yin, Xuanyu Jin, Ye He, Yuxin Zhou, Yuxuan Li, Xu Han, Wanxiang Che, Qi Shi, Ting Liu, Maosong Sun
